justification: All 7 ACs covered with correct test logic. AC6 boundary correctly tested as valid (not as error) for both credit_card and bank_transfer. AC7 whitespace tested with multiple whitespace-only strings including 3-space string. AC2 fee arithmetic verified numerically (refundAmount = amount - 1.5, fee=1.5). Boundary values exact: 0 for AC4, 10001 for AC5, 10000 for AC6. No implementation changes reported (test file created only). acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 7 ACs to test names. deviations section is empty.

observations.text: All 7 ACs explicitly covered with dedicated describe blocks and multiple sub-cases each
AC6 correctly treats amount=10000 as valid, tests both credit_card and bank_transfer at boundary
AC7 tests whitespace-only strings (3-space, tab+newline, single space) — not just empty string
AC2 fee arithmetic verified exactly: fee=1.5 and refundAmount = amount - 1.5
No implementation modifications — only test file created
acceptance_criteria_coverage complete with all 7 ACs mapped to test names
AC6 bank_transfer refundAmount stated as 9998.5 but should be 10000-1.50=9998.50 — value is correct, notation is fine
AC4 includes negative value (-1) as additional guard coverage beyond the exact boundary
